---
title: "ggkmcif2"
format: docx
editor: source
---

```{r setup}
library(reportRmd)
data("pembrolizumab")
```

## Testing header above


```{r}
data(pembrolizumab)
tab <- rm_covsum(data = pembrolizumab,
                 covs = c("age", "sex"),
                 maincov = "cohort",
                 tableOnly = TRUE)

  # row.names = NULL;
  # to_indent = numeric(0);
  # bold_headers = TRUE;
  # rows_bold = numeric(0);
  # bold_cells = NULL;
  # caption = NULL;
  # digits = 2
  # applyAttributes = TRUE;
  # keep.rownames = FALSE;
  # nicenames = TRUE;
  # format = NULL;
  # header_above = c(" " = 2, "Cohort" = 5, " " = 1)

outTable(tab,
         header_above = c(" " = 2, "Cohort" = 5, " " = 1),format = "doc")
```

```{r}
outTable(tab,
         header_above = c(" " = 2, "Cohort" = 5, " " = 1),format = "doc",to_indent = 1:4,rows_bold = 1,applyAttributes = F)
```

## Testing include_unadjusted = T


```{r}
data("pembrolizumab")
glm_fit = glm(change_ctdna_group~sex*age+baseline_ctdna,
data=pembrolizumab,family = 'binomial')
rm_mvsum(glm_fit, include_unadjusted = T)
```


# Checking small p values

```{r}
set.seed(123)
n <- 200
x1 <- rnorm(n)
x2 <- factor(sample(c("A","B","C"), n, replace = TRUE))
x3 <- rnorm(n)
y <- 2 + 3*x1 + ifelse(x2=="B", 4, ifelse(x2=="C", -3, 0)) + rnorm(n, sd = 0.5)
testdata <- data.frame(y = y, x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)
rm_mvsum(lm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = testdata), include_unadjusted = TRUE)

```

```{r}
library(reportRmd)
data("pembrolizumab")

# Model with NA coefficients (sex:cohort has empty cells causing aliasing)
glm_fit <- glm(change_ctdna_group ~ sex:cohort + baseline_ctdna,
               data = pembrolizumab, family = "binomial")

# Check which coefficients are NA
coef(glm_fit)

# Should now produce a table with a warning instead of an error
rm_mvsum(glm_fit, tableOnly = F)

```

```{r}
set.seed(42)
df <- data.frame(
  y  = rnorm(50),
  x1 = rnorm(50),
  x2 = factor(sample(c("A", "B"), 50, replace = TRUE))
)
df$x3 <- df$x1  # x3 is identical to x1 -> NA coefficient

fit <- lm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = df)
coef(fit)
rm_mvsum(fit, tableOnly = F)

```


```{r}
library(lme4)
lmer_fit <- lme4::lmer(age ~ sex + pdl1 + (1|cohort), data = pembrolizumab)
summary(lmer_fit)
rm_mvsum(lmer_fit)
lme4::glm
```

# Test predsum
```{r}
# my predsum tests ----
set.seed(1)
n <- 500
true  <- rbinom(n, 1, 0.4)
score <- plogis(-0.5 + 1.8 * true + rnorm(n))
cut   <- 0.5

predsum(true, score, cutoff = cut, tableOnly = TRUE, output = "epi")
predsum(true, score, cutoff = cut, tableOnly = TRUE, output = "data-science")
ps <- predsum(true, score, cutoff = cut, tableOnly = TRUE, output = "all")
ps_sep <- predsum(true, score, cutoff = cut, tableOnly = TRUE,
                  output = "all", ci_separate = TRUE,digits = 3)
get <- \(stat) as.numeric(ps_sep[ps_sep$Statistic == stat, c("Estimate","lower","upper")])

# AUC + Delong CI vs pROC
# install.packages("pROC")
library(pROC)
r <- roc(true, score, quiet = TRUE)
ci_proc <- as.numeric(ci.auc(r, method = "delong"))  # lower, auc, upper
cbind(predsum = get("AUC"), pROC = ci_proc[c(2,1,3)])

# Sensitivity / Specificity / PPV / NPV + Clopper-Pearson vs epiR
# install.packages("epiR")
library(epiR)
pred_bin <- as.integer(score >= cut)
# epiR wants a 2x2 with test+/test- as rows, disease+/- as cols
tab <- table(factor(pred_bin, levels = c(1,0)),
             factor(true,     levels = c(1,0)))
er <- epi.tests(tab, conf.level = 0.95)
er$detail |>
  subset(statistic %in% c("se","sp","pv.pos","pv.neg","diag.ac","ap")) |>
  print()
# Compare to:
rbind(
  Sensitivity = get("Sensitivity"),
  Specificity = get("Specificity"),
  PPV         = get("PPV"),
  NPV         = get("NPV"),
  Accuracy    = get("Accuracy"),
  Prevalence  = get("Prevalence")
)

# Brier score vs DescTools
# install.packages("DescTools")
DescTools::BrierScore(x = true, pred = score)
get("Brier")[1]

# F1 vs MLmetrics
# install.packages("MLmetrics")
MLmetrics::F1_Score(y_true = true, y_pred = pred_bin, positive = "1")
get("F1")[1]

# AUC-PR vs PRROC
# install.packages("PRROC")
library(PRROC)
pr <- pr.curve(scores.class0 = score[true == 1],
               scores.class1 = score[true == 0],
               curve = FALSE)
pr$auc.integral   # trapezoidal — matches predsum
get("AUC-PR")[1]

# Clopper-Pearson sanity vs binom.test
tp_fn <- sum(true == 1)
binom.test(sum(pred_bin == 1 & true == 1), tp_fn)$conf.int
get("Sensitivity")[2:3]

# Bootstrap mode — check it runs and AUC CI is close to Delong
psb <- predsum(true, score, cutoff = cut, ci = "bootstrap",
               nboot = 2000, tableOnly = TRUE, output = "all",
               ci_separate = TRUE)
psb[psb$Statistic == "AUC", ]

# Factor input + custom positive
tf <- factor(ifelse(true == 1, "case", "control"), levels = c("control","case"))
predsum(tf, score, cutoff = cut, tableOnly = TRUE)   # positive = "case" by default
predsum(tf, score, cutoff = cut, positive = "control", tableOnly = TRUE)

# Dichotomous predictions — AUC / AUC-PR / Cut-off should be absent
predsum(true, pred_bin, tableOnly = TRUE, output = "all")$Statistic


```
